## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and Hyperexponential for content strategy and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hyperexponential is expanding from a localized London market to the US, facing new competition and distributed customers](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by optional $9K/month ongoing services](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [The sprint includes research, artifact creation, content strategy development, and initial execution](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Target start date: Tuesday, September 2nd (post-Labor Day)](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)

## Topics

### Hyperexponential's Market Position and Challenges

  - [Historically sold within Lloyd's of London market, achieving 50% market share](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Entering US market with more distributed customers (New York, Bermuda, Chicago, Philadelphia)](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [New competitors in US: Federado, Sitora, Earnix (strong SEO presence)](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Average deal size: $1 million, with \~500 potential global accounts](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Key personas: underwriters (P\&L owners), actuaries (math support), IT/digital transformation leads](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Develops comprehensive content strategies tailored to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Uses AI-powered workflows for efficient content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Focuses on both SEO/AEO (AI Engine Optimization) and thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Creates various content types: blog posts, newsletters, product pages, social media content](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Emphasizes fact-checking and high-quality, industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

### GrowthX's Technology and Workflow

  - [Transitioned from AirOps to custom-built platform for better scalability and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Uses multiple AI models and complex prompting for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Implements fact-checking and quality control measures](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Provides collaborative tools for client feedback and content approval](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Proposed Engagement Structure

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20K)](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
      - [Research and context gathering](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [Artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [Content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [Initial execution and proof of concept](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Optional ongoing services at $9K/month after sprint completion](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)

### Content Examples and Use Cases

  - [Augment Code: SEO-optimized content leading to increased organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Biologica: Thought leadership content for healthcare supplements](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [Town.com: Detailed, fact-checked content for small business taxes](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send a detailed proposal with clear language and weekly breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide example artifacts (pending approval or anonymization)](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [David to review proposal and prepare for internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [Tentative start date set for Tuesday, September 2nd](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)
  - [Both parties to align on project scope and expectations before kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/udm3ZN7rWK3v38F9x_xELp8QMihofrPy?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)
